title: AgentFeedPayload
description: Payload for POST /agent/feed-items. Submit a batch of scraped feed items from a single source.

source.description: Platform identifier. Use: 'youtube', 'x', 'news', or a custom string.

items.description: Array of feed items to insert. Server deduplicates by URL.

source_id.description: Platform-native unique ID. Video ID for YouTube, tweet ID for X, URL hash for news.

title.description: Item title. Video title, tweet text (first 200 chars), or article headline.

url.description: Canonical URL of the content. Server normalises this for deduplication.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the content was originally published.

author.description: Content author. Channel name, @handle, or publication name.

content_preview.description: First ~300 characters of content body, description, or subtitle.

thumbnail_url.description: URL of a preview image or thumbnail.

tags.description: Tags for categorisation and filtering. Agent-assigned or derived from source.

is_discovery.description: false = from subscriptions/follows (main feed). true = from recommendations/trending (discovery feed).

source_type.description: Broad taxonomy for the source (e.g. social, video, news).

content_type.description: Content category such as video, article, or post.

card_type.description: Optional UI rendering hint for the client card renderer.

action_label.description: Optional CTA text override for the card action button.

action_icon.description: Optional Material icon name for the card action.

metadata.description: Optional structured metadata for custom cards and future UI use.
